title: Production publish verification + smoke-test overlay for Version 36

requirements.summary: Add production verification signals to ensure the live UI matches preview Version 36 behavior and detect version mismatches early.
acceptanceCriteria: The live/production URL serves the same UI and behavior as the current preview build (Version 36).
Both Admin and Member flows load successfully in production without requiring any new configuration steps from the user.
Backend canister upgrades successfully (including any required migration) and existing stored data remains intact after the production deployment.

file_operations.description: Define the expected backend/app version string for the production release (Version 36) so the UI can verify it after deployment.

Add a small, non-blocking UI notice component that can display when the backend-reported version differs from the expected Version 36 or when version is unavailable, to help validate the production promotion.

Wire expected Version 36 verification into the existing health-check flow: compare backend healthCheck() version against the expected production version and render ProductionVersionNotice only when a mismatch is detected (no behavior change when matching).

requirements.summary: Provide a production smoke-test overlay/checklist (Admin + Member) to verify release-critical flows immediately after publishing and quickly spot release-blocking issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin smoke tests pass in production: Internet Identity login, Admin dashboard loads, pause-request notification section is visible, and pending pause requests can be approved/denied successfully.

Member smoke tests pass in production: membership ID login works, Member dashboard loads, and membership status/pause-request status is rendered correctly for active/pending/paused/denied/expired states.
Backend health-check (used by the frontend connectivity-aware loading) succeeds in production when the canister is reachable and surfaces the correct error UI when it is not reachable.

file_operations.description: Add an explicit production smoke-test checklist (Admin + Member + health-check verification) that can be displayed in-app for post-publish verification.

Create an overlay component that renders the smoke-test checklist along with live readouts from the existing health-check query (reachable/unreachable + reported version) to support immediate production verification.
Wire SmokeTestOverlay behind a URL parameter toggle (e.g., smoketest=1 using the existing URL param helpers) so it can be used in production verification without impacting normal end users.
